Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-20_21-58-27_claim-office-example-mapping_v4.1-testlist-scope-fix_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts

Add loyalty discount: if customer.yearsWithMHPCO >= 2, multiply the policy base premium (sum of all item-level totals including their per-item modifiers) by 0.8 (20% off). Then add 5 fee. Ceiling at end.

Make sure all previous tests still pass — newcomer has yearsWithMHPCO 0, so no discount.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor.

content.text: I'll analyze the failing test and implement the minimal change needed.
Now I'll implement the minimal change - apply loyalty discount when yearsWithMHPCO >= 2.

content.text:
All 17 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Added a loyalty discount that multiplies the policy base premium by 0.8 when `customer.yearsWithMHPCO >= 2`, applied after summing item totals and before adding the processing fee.
**Result**: All tests now pass (17 passing, 38 todo)
**Approach**: Minimal change — added a single `if` check before adding the processing fee. The newcomer tests (yearsWithMHPCO 0) are unaffected since the condition is false. The customer parameter is now used (no longer prefixed with `_`).
